Indra.
These measures will wipe out the evil effects of the
Gandanta.
7. In case the performance of remedial rites, described
above, is beyond the means of any person, he should give a
cow in charity. This will also appease the deities and
promote relief from the evil effects of the Gandanta.
Because the giving of a cow in charity has been considered
a superior remedial measure than giving in charity all the
lands, belonging to a person.”
